title: goniopteris luzonensis
intro: Goniopteris luzonensis, also known as the Luzon fern, is a species of plant in the family Polypodiaceae that is native to the Philippines. It is a type of fern that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. Goniopteris luzonensis can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it is also used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations.
